svg.text: Ride streaks · 3 consecutive wins → +25% size · 5 wins → +50% · proven edge deserves more capital

g.text: Baseline: 1R = 1% of account · sticks to this most of the time
After 3 consecutive wins: scale to 1.25R · still 1% but bigger absolute
After 5 consecutive wins: scale to 1.5R · max scale
Hit ONE loss: drop back to baseline 1R immediately
→ Streaks happen during favorable regimes · capitalize
→ Single loss = regime potentially changed · cool size
→ +30-50% boost to CAGR vs pure fixed sizing
Never scale UP after a losing trade · resets to baseline only
Never skip a tier · 1R → 1.25R → 1.5R progression always
